BLOCKED_gate.exact_unblock: Commit a byte-reproducible release build of m3_match as a tracked artifact (or a hermetic build recipe producing the identical hash), then the gate passes on CI. Building on CI does NOT reproduce the hash.
BLOCKED_gate.name: verify_forgelens_phase_a replay-verifier hash check (public CI only)
BLOCKED_gate.note: verify_forgelens_phase_a PASSES locally where the allowlisted binary exists; it is BLOCKED only on public CI where the artifact is absent.
BLOCKED_gate.reason: The allowlisted replay verifier (target/release/m3_match sha 6d9aabf9) is a locally-built, gitignored, non-byte-reproducible artifact. A fresh CI build produces a different hash (4f803c16 on identical rustc 1.96.0 + Cargo.lock). The gate is release-only by design and has never passed on CI (no successful run exists on this branch).
